title: tanacetum tatsienense
intro: Tanacetum tatsienense, also known as Tatsienense Tansy, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Tanacetum tatsienense include reducing fever, relieving pain and menstrual cramps, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Tanacetum tatsienense is typically prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, although the plant is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make infusions and poultices.
